_meta.purpose: Bifrost gateway config mirroring this kit's four tier aliases, for the `bifrost` compose profile (COMPOSE_PROFILES=bifrost). Bifrost is the Go, µs-class, native-OTel alternative to the default LiteLLM gateway — see docs/guide/reference/gateway-variants.md.
_meta.note: EXPERIMENTAL TEMPLATE — Bifrost's config schema evolves; verify these keys against the pinned image (maximhq/bifrost:v1.5.2) before relying on it. What MUST hold regardless of schema: the four aliases exist, tier-private has an EMPTY fallback list (the privacy pin — it can never leave the box), and tier-frontier carries the daily budget.

providers._ollama_note: base_url is the IN-CONTAINER ollama URL; unlike LiteLLM this is not read from OLLAMA_API_BASE. Host-native Ollama (macOS/Windows, --scale ollama=0): change this to http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1 — see gateway-variants.md. macOS/Apple Silicon: swap tier-heavy/tier-private model to qwen3.6:27b-mlx for the MLX engine (qwen3-coder has no MLX build, so tier-fast keeps its tag).
